guidanceConsulted.query: run dense segmentation off the main thread
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep the dense-output canvas composite off the main thread; transfer an ImageBitmap.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — SegFormer inference AND the per-pixel argmax→colour composite run in models/face-parsing/worker.js; the worker builds the overlay ImageBitmap via OffscreenCanvas.transferToImageBitmap and TRANSFERS it, so the main thread only drawImage()s it (invariant 15).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: worker.js buildOverlayBitmap + transfer; conformance inference-off-main-thread pass

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive image canvas overlay without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid, contained media; avoid layout thrash on large canvases.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — stage/viz canvases use inline-size:100%; block-size:auto; max-block-size; object-fit:contain so a 1000px map never overflows; opacity drags re-drawImage the cached bitmap (no putImageData).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout; wrap sample strip, controls; ≥44px tap targets.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap sample strip + swatch buttons (min-block-size 40-44px), slider-row wraps. responsive-check: desktop clean, mobile clean (0px overflow).

openQuestions: Does Xenova/face-parsing return a real 19-class face-part label map at q8 on WASM? (agent-verified: yes — background/skin/hat/cloth masks with correct non-zero pixel counts on the sample portrait.)
Does face-parsing produce semantically correct image-segmentation output on a real device (manual-evidenced)?
Are all controls keyboard-operable with visible focus on both classes?

followUpGoals.goal: Agent matrix pass for face-parsing: Read the mobile+desktop screenshots, confirm real output + tap targets + focus + dialogs, then flip support to ok (or unsupported+evidence) and enrich this critique.

summary: Revision-1 seed for face-parsing (image-segmentation, wasm) derived from the real conformance run + responsive screenshots. Auto-checkable assertions are recorded with their true pass/fail/blocked state; manual-evidenced dimensions await an agent verdict. Not a final review.
